testcase.name: tests.test_errors
testcase.error: /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1398: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1371: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1342: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:938: in _load_unlocked ??? ../../.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py:197: in exec_module exec(co, module.__dict__) ../phase_10/tests/test_errors.py:2: in <module> from tinylang.lexer import tokenize tinylang/lexer.py:1: in <module> from tinylang.ast import * tinylang/ast.py:22: in <module> @dataclass ^^^^^^^^^ /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1442: in dataclass return wrap(cls) ^^^^^^^^^ /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1432: in wrap return _process_class(cls, init, repr, eq, order, unsafe_hash, /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1136: in _process_class _init_fn(all_init_fields, /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:687: in _init_fn raise TypeError(f'non-default argument {f.name!r} ' E TypeError: non-default argument 'line' follows default argument 'else_block'

testcase.name: tests.test_lexer
testcase.error: /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1398: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1371: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1342: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:938: in _load_unlocked ??? ../../.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py:197: in exec_module exec(co, module.__dict__) ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:1: in <module> from tinylang.lexer import tokenize tinylang/lexer.py:1: in <module> from tinylang.ast import * tinylang/ast.py:22: in <module> @dataclass ^^^^^^^^^ /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1442: in dataclass return wrap(cls) ^^^^^^^^^ /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1432: in wrap return _process_class(cls, init, repr, eq, order, unsafe_hash, /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1136: in _process_class _init_fn(all_init_fields, /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:687: in _init_fn raise TypeError(f'non-default argument {f.name!r} ' E TypeError: non-default argument 'line' follows default argument 'else_block'

testcase.name: tests.test_parser
testcase.error: /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1398: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1371: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1342: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:938: in _load_unlocked ??? ../../.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py:197: in exec_module exec(co, module.__dict__) ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:1: in <module> from tinylang.parser import parse tinylang/parser.py:1: in <module> from tinylang.ast import * tinylang/ast.py:22: in <module> @dataclass ^^^^^^^^^ /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1442: in dataclass return wrap(cls) ^^^^^^^^^ /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1432: in wrap return _process_class(cls, init, repr, eq, order, unsafe_hash, /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:1136: in _process_class _init_fn(all_init_fields, /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/dataclasses.py:687: in _init_fn raise TypeError(f'non-default argument {f.name!r} ' E TypeError: non-default argument 'line' follows default argument 'else_block'
